manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are playing a text adventure game. I will describe what you can perceive in the game. You write the single action you want to take in the game starting with >. Only reply with an action.
For example:
> open cupboard

You can have up to two objects in your inventory at the same time.

Your goal for this game is: Put the pillow in the refrigerator, the book in the wardrobe and the plate on the shelf.

Once you have achieved your goal, write "> done" to end the game.

You are in a living room now. There are a side table, a chair, a couch and a table. There is a passage to a hallway here.

You are playing a text adventure game. I will describe what you can perceive in the game. You write the single action you want to take in the game starting with >. Only reply with an action.

You can have up to two objects in your inventory at the same time.

Your goal for this game is: Put the pillow in the refrigerator, the book in the wardrobe and the plate on the shelf.

Once you have achieved your goal, write "> done" to end the game.

You are in a living room now. There are a side table, a chair, a couch and a table. There is a passage to a hallway here.
> examine couch
This is a couch. There is nothing on the couch.

> examine table
This is a table. There is nothing on the table.

> go hallway
You are in a hallway now. There is a potted plant. The potted plant is on the floor. There are passages to a living room, a kitchen, a broom closet and a bedroom here.
